stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 14, how will the addition of a stopway affect the four declared distances? It increases the...

options.a: ASDA and TORA, while the TODA and LDA remain unchanged.
options.b: LDA, while the ASDA, TORA, and TODA remain unchanged.
options.c: ASDA, while the TORA, TODA, and LDA remain unchanged.
options.d: ASDA, TORA, and TODA, while the LDA remains unchanged.
